name: BrVR Backrooms Virtual Reality
short_description: Explore 120+ Backrooms levels in a massive single‑player survival adventure. Build, craft, fight, or just wander endless liminal spaces shaped by the community.
detailed_description:
BrVR Backrooms Virtual Reality
Step into the most comprehensive VR recreation of The Backrooms ever created.
Featuring 120+ authentic levels, 60+ entities, and complete freedom to explore the way you want in true solo isolation.

BrVR delivers the definitive Backrooms experience in virtual reality.
This is not another low‑effort maze game or puzzle‑heavy multiplayer project.
It is a carefully built single‑player survival experience that recreates the strange reality of liminal spaces with atmosphere and depth.

THE BACKROOMS EXPERIENCE

120+ AUTHENTIC LEVELS
Explore the renowned yellow halls of Level 0, the mysterious Poolrooms, Level Fun, and countless other distinctive spaces inspired by established Backrooms lore. The game is currently in Phase 4 of a five‑phase upgrade plan focused on improved graphics, lighting, signage, optimization, new voice work, NPCs and more.

60+ ENTITIES AND CREATURES
Face a wide range of inhabitants, from friendly wanderers to hostile forms. You can fight, flee, build traps, or befriend helpful entities that will follow and assist you.
Don’t like entities in The Backrooms? Just turn them off in the EXTENSIVE settings menu.

TRUE SOLO EXPERIENCE
BrVR is single‑player by design. We believe The Backrooms should convey isolation and unease, so the experience remains purely personal and atmospheric.

PLAY YOUR WAY

  • No Entities Mode for quiet, pure exploration

  • No Gore Mode for players wanting a less intense experience

  • No Firearms Mode for melee or stealth survival

  • Sandbox Mode spawn items, experiment, and test mechanics freely

MORE THAN JUST LIMINAL HALLWAYS

Survival and Discovery
Gather resources, craft tools and shelter, and manage inventory as you move deeper into the impossible geometry of the Backrooms.

Mini‑Games and Activities
Spend time inside experiences such as casino games, sports simulations, or creative experiments built into the world.

Join the M.E.G.
Work with the Major Explorer Group to trade, access bases, and complete missions while uncovering the greater mysteries surrounding the Backrooms.

COMMUNITY AT THE HEART OF BRVR

Community‑Created Levels
Players with Unreal Engine knowledge contribute new levels with guidance and feedback through our Discord server. Several community‑made levels have already been added to the game. Our rough SDK and active support help new creators join in and learn while maintaining quality.

Your Name in the Game
Many in‑game businesses and props carry names of community members, playtesters, and supporters. A Supporters Wall features fans and subscribers, and memorial Easter eggs honor players and friends who have lost loved people or pets. Join the Discord for news, tips, to playtest or get your name on the supporters wall.

Discord Community
Our Discord remains the core of development feedback and collaboration. The current schedule is one update per month or when there is enough content to release.

VR COMPATIBILITY

PCVR only
Optimized for Quest 2 and Rift. Tested on Meta Link runtime.
Choose the Meta runtime at startup for best results.
Community bindings are available for Index.
12 gb of Vram are suggested for the full experience.
Otherwise, turn settings to low and turn off entities for better performance.
Community bindings are available for Index.
There is no official Vive Cosmos support.
